name: Strawberry Tiramisu Cake
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces ripe strawberries (2 pints), hulled and sliced
Reserve 6 or so whole berries for garnish
8 ounces cream cheese or mascarpone, softened
6 tablespoons Grand Marnier or orange juice
1 angel food cake (6 to 8 inches round)
recipeInstructions:
1. For Double Strawberry Sauce:
- Puree 1 1/4 cups of the sliced strawberries with the strawberry jam. Refrigerate until serving time.
2. Beat together the cheese, 1/3 cup confectioner's sugar, and 1 tablespoon liqueur until well blended and smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, beat cream, remaining 2 tablespoons sugar, and 2 tablespoons liqueur until soft peaks form. Fold 1/2 cup of this into the cheese mixture.
4. With a serrated knife, cut cake in thirds horizontally. Drizzle each layer with 1 tablespoon of the remaining liqueur.
5. Spread bottom layer with one third of the cheese filling; cover with one third of the sliced strawberries. Top with middle cake layer. Spread with half of the remaining filling and sliced strawberries. Add remaining cake layer; spread with remaining filling and sliced berries.
6. Frost cake with remaining whipped cream. Refrigerate at least 2 hours or up to 24 hours before serving.
7. Cut cake with a serrated knife. Serve each slice with sauce.
